name: Pasta Carbonara
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb to 1/2 lb bacon or pancetta
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop bacon or pancetta into 1/2-inch pieces.
2. Cook in a heavy saucepan until the bacon reaches your desired level of doneness (if using pancetta, sauté in butter or oil until translucent).
3. Meanwhile, combine milk and vinegar; let sit for 5 minutes to sour the milk.
4. Add the milk mixture to the pan of drained bacon, bring just to a boil; cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Add eggs (well beaten) and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
6. Stir in Parmesan and toss with cooked pasta. Serve with extra Parmesan on the side.
